title: Bob Carter
compiled_truth: Bob Carter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-17), Bob Carter sent 7 and received 269 emails, totalling 276 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (4), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (3), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (3), [Jeffrey Hodge](people/jeffrey-hodge) (2), [Janet Dietrich](people/janet-dietrich) (1).
